name: Sipa Resources Limited
description: Auravelle Metals, formerly known as Sipa Resources Limited, is an Australian-based mineral exploration company listed on the ASX since 1987. The company is focused on gold exploration, maintaining a portfolio of high-quality projects across Western Australia and South Australia. With a proven track record in project generation and greenfields discovery, Auravelle utilizes disciplined, technically driven exploration programs to target significant mineral deposits in Tier-1 regions. The company is committed to creating shareholder value through the discovery of new gold assets located within proven, infrastructure-rich mineral belts.
